gold: E-posta adresim Zaynep nokta Arslan at email nokta com.
predicted: E posta adresin Zeynep arslan net email.com.
werNormalizedGold: e posta adresim zaynep nokta arslan at email nokta com
werNormalizedPredicted: e posta adresin zeynep arslan net email nokta com
sigWerNormalizedGold: e posta adresim zaynep nokta arslan at email nokta com
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: e posta adresin zeynep arslan net email nokta com

sigWerErrors.reason: 'adresim' means 'my address' and 'adresin' means 'your address' in Turkish; this changes the grammatical person but does not derail the meaning of the sentence.
Omitting 'nokta' (which means 'dot') in an email address changes the actual address and could cause delivery failure.
Replacing 'at' (the '@' symbol in email addresses) with 'net' changes the structure and meaning of the email address, making it invalid.
